v1.desc: Urban autumn boulevard, golden ginkgo trees, city traffic, high-rises
v1.formal: A wide urban boulevard lined with golden ginkgo trees in full autumn foliage, with multiple lanes of traffic flowing through the city below high-rise residential buildings.
v1.sarcastic: A city that decided trees were a good idea, which is more than most cities can say.
v1.humorous_tech: Nature's annual deployment: all leaf nodes updated to yellow simultaneously, no breaking changes reported.
v1.humorous_non_tech: The trees got together and decided to put on a show, and honestly they are the only ones putting in any effort.

v2.desc: Orange kitten among green foliage in a garden, looking at camera
v2.formal: A young orange tabby kitten sits among dense green foliage in an outdoor setting, looking directly at the camera with an alert and curious expression.
v2.sarcastic: A kitten outdoors, clearly plotting something elaborate and fully confident it will succeed.
v2.humorous_tech: A small autonomous agent has entered the garden environment and is scanning for input. Next action: unknown. Rollback plan: none.
v2.humorous_non_tech: A tiny cat has gone outside and is now judging everything it sees with great authority.

v3.desc: Young woman at desktop computer, bright modern open-plan office
v3.formal: A young professional woman is seated at a desktop computer workstation in a bright, modern open-plan office, focused intently on her screen.
v3.sarcastic: A person at a computer, apparently working, which is exactly what someone would do if they were not working.
v3.humorous_tech: She has been staring at this bug for forty minutes. The bug is a missing comma. The comma is winning.
v3.humorous_non_tech: A woman at a computer, visibly handling something extremely important that will be completely forgotten by Thursday.

v4.desc: Mountain landscape, greenery and rocky formations
v4.formal: The frame captures a panoramic view of a mountainous landscape characterized by lush greenery and rocky formations.
v4.sarcastic: Ah yes, the perfect spot for a picnic... if you enjoy climbing sheer cliffs for snacks.
v4.humorous_tech: When your code runs perfectly on the first try, but the mountains still have more layers than your stack trace.
v4.humorous_non_tech: When you finally find a hiking trail but realize you forgot the snacks.

v5.desc: Ocean waves onto a beach/rocky shore
v5.formal: The video frame captures a serene beach scene with gentle waves lapping against the rocky shore.
v5.sarcastic: Ah yes, nothing says relaxation like a beach perfectly devoid of any human activity.
v5.humorous_tech: When your code runs perfectly in the dev environment but crashes like a wave in production.
v5.humorous_non_tech: When you finally hit the beach after a long week, but the ocean waves say 'not today, buddy.'

v6.desc: Busy city intersection, pedestrians and vehicles
v6.formal: The image captures a bustling intersection in Shibuya, Tokyo, featuring a variety of vehicles including trucks and buses navigating the crosswalks.
v6.sarcastic: Just another quiet day in the bustling metropolis of... wait, what city is this again?
v6.humorous_tech: When you realize your deployment is live and the traffic is more than you expected!
v6.humorous_non_tech: When you finally leave the house but forget where you were going.

v7.desc: Person chopping vegetables (zucchini) in a kitchen
v7.formal: A person is chopping zucchini into small cubes on a wooden cutting board.
v7.sarcastic: Ah yes, the ancient art of chopping zucchini... truly the pinnacle of culinary skills.
v7.humorous_tech: When you try to refactor your code but end up with too many slices instead of clean functions.
v7.humorous_non_tech: When you realize you actually have to chop the veggies before dinner can happen.

v8.desc: Red athletic track, empty spectator seats, outdoor sports facility
v8.formal: A red athletic track is prominently displayed in the foreground, featuring multiple lanes marked with white lines and numbers, with rows of white seats behind.
v8.sarcastic: Ah yes, nothing quite like a full day of watching grass grow from the best seat in the house.
v8.humorous_tech: When you deploy your code, but the only ones cheering are the empty seats.
v8.humorous_non_tech: When you show up to the game and realize it's just a practice session.
